title: 3 Facts About The Sun

segments.text: The Sun is so big that one million Earths could fit inside it.
And it is only getting started.
Light from the Sun takes about eight minutes to reach your eyes.
Its core burns at around fifteen million degrees Celsius.
Every second, the Sun turns four million tons of itself into pure energy.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: A million Earths fit inside the Sun, and it eats 4 million tons of itself every second. Follow for daily facts!
